name: define-x
description: 65 plug-and-play, best-practice, product management skills for AI agents: 30 Triple Diamond phase + 8 foundation + 10 utility + 15 tool (Foundation Sprint + Design Sprint)... Plus 4 sub-agents, templates, workflows, samples, learning resources & guides, CI-enforced contracts. Apache 2.0.
author: product-on-purpose
summary_zh: 一套面向 AI 智能体的产品管理技能包，内置 65 个开箱即用的最佳实践模块，覆盖三钻流程、基础冲刺和设计冲刺等环节，并配套子代理、模板和工作流，适合想让 AI 协助打通产品全流程的团队。
